heading: Injunction against unauthorized manufacture, use, or reproduction
label: 580p–4 Injunction against unauthorized manufacture, use, or reproduction
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 488b–6 of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982
amendments: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 488b–6 of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982

children.label: a
children.text: Whoever, except as provided by rules and regulations issued by the Secretary, manufactures, uses, or reproduces the character “Smokey Bear”, or the name “Smokey Bear”, or a facsimile or simulation of such character or name in such a manner as suggests “Smokey Bear” may be enjoined from such manufacture, use, or reproduction at the suit of the Attorney General upon complaint by the Secretary.

children.label: b
children.text: Whoever, except as provided by rules and regulations issued by the Secretary, manufactures, uses, or reproduces the character “Woodsy Owl”, the name “Woodsy Owl”, or the slogan “Give a Hoot, Don’t Pollute”, or a fac­simile or simulation of such character, name, or slogan in such a manner as suggests “Woodsy Owl” may be enjoined from such manufacture, use, or reproduction at the suit of the Attorney General upon complaint by the Secretary.
